data.biography:
Michael Kevin Paré (born October 9, 1958) is an American actor. His first starring role was as Tony Villicana on the television series The Greatest American Hero. His best-known film roles were as Eddie Wilson in Eddie and the Cruisers (1983) and its sequel Eddie and the Cruisers II: Eddie Lives! (1989), as well as Tom Cody in Streets of Fire (1984), David Herdeg in The Philadelphia Experiment (1984), Frank McGowan in Village of the Damned (1995), Bill Pruitt in Hope Floats (1998), (Adult) Trip Fontaine in The Virgin Suicides (2000), Detective Kurlen in The Lincoln Lawyer (2011), Lt. Ray Bozeman in Gone (2012) with Amanda Seyfried, Mr. Wallington in Bone Tomahawk (2015), and Varney in City of Lies (2018).

His best known TV roles are as Tony Villicana on The Greatest American Hero, Joey La Fiamma on CBS's drama Houston Knights, and Dante Montana on the Canadian sci-fi series Starhunter (2000-2001) and its' continuation series Starhunter ReduX (2018-2019).

He won the best actor Award at PollyGrind Film Festival for his reprisal role as Tom Cody in Road to Hell.

Some info ​from Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.
data.name: Michael Paré

data.biography:
Michael Kevin Paré (n. Brooklyn, Nueva York, Estados Unidos; 9 de octubre de 1958) es un actor estadounidense de cine y televisión. Conocido por sus actuaciones en películas como Streets of Fire (1984), Village of the Damned (1995), Hope Floats (1998) o Las vírgenes suicidas (1999).

Michael Paré nació el 9 de octubre de 1958 en Brooklyn, Nueva York, Estados Unidos. Hijo de Joan, ama de casa, y de Francis Paré que poseía varias tiendas. Tiene seis hermanas y tres hermanos. Su padre tenía ancestros franceses y canadienses, mientras que los de su madre eran irlandeses. Su padre murió cuando él tenía cinco años, a causa de una leucemia, dejando a su madre al cargo de su gran familia. Fue un gran atleta, siendo su primer deporte el boxeo. Paré estudió para ser chef en la Culinary Institute of America, trabajando en ello hasta que se retiró para ser modelo masculino. Su trabajo como modelo le abrió las puertas de la interpretación, cuando fue descubierto por el director de casting Joyce Selznick; en los años 80 estudió interpretación. Reside con su mujer en Ámsterdam, Países Bajos.

Michael Paré (nascido em 9 de outubro de 1958) é um ator americano. Seu primeiro papel principal foi como Tony Villicana na série de televisão The Greatest American Hero. Seus papéis mais conhecidos no cinema foram como Eddie Wilson em Eddie and the Cruisers (1983) e sua sequência Eddie and the Cruisers II: Eddie Lives! (1989), bem como Streets of Fire (1984) e The Philadelphia Experiment (1984). Outros filmes incluíram Moon 44 (1990), Village of the Damned (1995), Bad Moon (1996), Hope Floats (1998) e The Virgin Suicides (1999). Paré ganhou o prêmio de melhor ator no PollyGrind Film Festival pelo filme Road to Hell interpretando novamente o papel de Tom Cody. Na televisão, Paré estrelou com Michael Beck no drama policial da CBS Houston Knights em 1987-88, bem como na curta série de televisão de ficção científica de 2001, Starhunter. Paré aparece frequentemente nas obras de Uwe Boll.

迈克尔·帕雷（Michael Paré，1958年10月9日-），美国演员。他的第一个主演角色是在电视连续剧《最伟大的美国英雄》中饰演托尼·维利卡纳。他最著名的电影角色是在《埃迪与巡洋舰》（1983 年）及其续集《埃迪与巡洋舰 II：埃迪活着！（1989 年），以及《火街》（1984 年）和《费城实验》（1984 年）。其他电影包括《月亮 44》（1990 年）、《诅咒之村》（1995 年）、《坏月亮》（1996 年）、《希望漂浮》（1998 年）和《处女自杀》（1999 年）。帕雷凭借电影《地狱之路》获得波利格林电影节最佳男演员奖，再次饰演汤姆·科迪。在电视上，帕雷与迈克尔·贝克一起出演了 1987-88 年的 CBS 警匪剧《休斯顿骑士》，以及 2001 年短命的科幻电视连续剧《星际猎人》。帕雷经常出现在乌韦·波尔的作品中。
data.name: 迈克尔·帕雷

data.biography: 邁克爾·帕雷（Michael Paré，1958 年 10 月 9 日-），美國演員。他的第一個主演角色是在電視聯續劇《最偉大的美國英雄》中飾演託尼·維利卡納。他最著名的電影角色是在《埃迪與巡洋艦》（1983 年）及其續集《埃迪與巡洋艦 II：埃迪活著！（1989 年），以及《火街》（1984 年）和《費城實驗》（1984 年）。其他電影包括《月亮 44》（1990 年）、《詛咒之村》（1995 年）、《壞月亮》（1996 年）、《希望漂浮》（1998 年）和《處女自殺》（1999 年）。帕雷憑藉電影《地獄之路》獲得波利格林電影節最佳男演員獎，再次飾演湯姆·科迪。在電視上，帕雷與邁克爾·貝克一起出演了 1987 - 88 年的 CBS 警匪劇《休斯頓騎士》，以及 2001 年短命的科幻電視聯續劇《星際獵人》。帕雷經常出現在烏韋·波爾的作品中。
data.name: 邁克爾·帕雷

data.biography: María Adánez is a Spanish actress.
data.name: María Adánez

data.biography: María Adánez Almenara (12 de marzo de 1976) es actriz española. Su madre maquilladora Paca Almenara. Conocida sobre todo por sus papeles en cuatro series cómicas de mayor éxito en historia de televisión española: Lucía Álvarez en serie Aquí no hay quien viva, María en Farmacia de guardia, Pepa y Pepe y Rebeca Ortiz en La que se avecina.​ En cine destaca papel de Lena en película norteamericana My Life in Ruins (Mi vida en ruinas) que se estrenó en 13 países y recaudó más de 20 millones de dólares.
Audrey Douglass is a dancer , choreographer, stunt actor and actress known for La La Land (2016), The Morning Show (2019) and Train: Play That Song (2016).
data.name: Audrey Douglass

data.biography:
Sam Reid, born on February 19, 1987, in New South Wales, Australia, is a actor known for his captivating performances in film and television. He grew up on a cattle property in the Monaro region and developed a passion for acting at a young age. Reid pursued his craft at the London Academy of Music and Dramatic Art (LAMDA), graduating in 2010 as the star student of his year.

Reid gained recognition for his role as Lestat de Lioncourt in the AMC series Interview with the Vampire (2022–present), earning critical acclaim. He has also starred in notable productions such as The Newsreader (2021–2025), Lambs of God (2019), and the period drama Belle (2013), where he played John Davinier.
data.name: Sam Reid

data.biography: Teresa Apple Lo (Chinese: 夏萍, 6 October 1937 － 5 August 2019) was a Hong Kong actress.
data.name: Teresa Ha Ping

data.biography:
夏萍（1937年10月6日-2019年8月5日），原名卢少萍。英文名：Teresa，后用Apple，生于中国香港。香港甘草演员、TVB资深艺人。

夏萍二次大战时曾到中国内地居住，至战后回港。1955年，夏萍投考电影公司成为演员，1970年加入邵氏电影拍片13年，1982年加入无线电视。加入电视圈后，演出人母甚至祖母级角色，横跨演艺圈60年，是圈中出名金牌绿叶的老戏骨。2005年在TVB台庆晚会上，夏萍击败汪明荃获得了TVB万千光辉演艺大奖（相当于终身成就奖） [1]  。 [2]  2019年8月5日，夏萍安详离世，享年81岁
data.name: 夏萍

data.biography:
夏萍（1937 年 10 月 6 日 - 2019 年 8 月 5 日），原名盧少萍。英文名：Teresa，後用 Apple，生於香港。香港甘草演員、TVB 資深藝人。

夏萍二次大戰時曾到中國內地居住，至戰後回港。1955 年，夏萍投考電影公司成為演員，1970 年加入邵氏電影拍片 13 年，1982 年加入無線電視。加入電視圈後，演出人母甚至祖母級角色，橫跨演藝圈 60 年，是圈中出名金牌綠葉的老戲骨。2005 年在 TVB 台慶晚會上，夏萍擊敗汪明荃獲得了 TVB 萬千光輝演藝大獎（相當於終身成就獎） 。

2019 年 8 月 5 日，夏萍安詳離世，享年 81 歲
data.name: 夏萍

data.biography:
Teresa Ha ( Chinesisch :夏萍) (6. Oktober 1937 – 5. August 2019) war eine ehemalige chinesische Fernseh- und Filmschauspielerin aus Hongkong. Ha hat in über 260 Filmen mitgewirkt.

Karriere

1956 begann Ha ihre Schauspielkarriere in Hongkong-Filmen. Ha trat zum ersten Mal in The Soul Stealer auf, einem 1956 erschienenen Kriminalfilm unter der Regie von Ng Wui. Ha's letzter Film war I Love You, Mom, ein 2013 erschienener Film unter der Regie von Casey Chan Lai-Ying. Ha hat in über 260 Filmen mitgewirkt.

Ha kam 1982 zu TVB und blieb bis 2016 beim Sender. Sie gewann 2005 bei der TVB-Jubiläumsgala eine Auszeichnung.
data.name: Teresa Ha

data.biography:
Fernando Cuautle (September 11, 1994, Puebla de Zaragoza, Mexico) is a Mexican film and television actor. At the age of 17, she began her acting studies at the M&M Studio school run by Patricia Reyes Spíndola where she attended 14 workshops, mainly focused on theater and television. Later, she took an intensive theater workshop with Abraham Oceransky, an acting improvement workshop with Cecilia Suárez and Luis Rosales. At the UDC he took a diploma in film acting with Noe Hernández and Giovanna Zacarías. At CEUVOZ, a voice workshop with Margarita Sanz and finally a film acting workshop with Rocío Belmont.

He began working on television, in series such as Blue Demon (2016) and Rosario Tijeras (2016), before landing a regular role in the series Los elegidos (2019) and starring in his first feature film: the acclaimed film Nebaj (2019), Based on a true story and directed by Kenneth Muller. Fernando is also about to release two feature films, Nuevo orden (2020) by Michel Franco and the North American production No Man's Land (2021), by Connor Allyn, where he shares credits with Frank Grillo and Andie MacDowell.
data.name: Fernando Cuautle

data.biography: Chin Chinawut Indracusin is a singer, model and actor born to a French mother and a Thai father. He started his career early on by signing with the biggest record label in Thailand, GMM Grammy who selected him for the G-JUNIOR young artist development program.
data.name: Chinawut Indracusin
ชินวุฒ อินทรคูสิน

data.biography:
Lucas Bravo is a French actor and model. He is known for starring in the Netflix romantic comedy series Emily in Paris as chef Gabriel, Emily's downstairs neighbor and love interest.

He is the son of the retired French footballer Daniel Bravo and singer Eva Bravo.
data.name: Lucas Bravo

data.biography: Ο Λούκας Μπράβο (Lucas Bravo) είναι Γάλλος ηθοποιός. Είναι περισσότερο γνωστός για τον πρωταγωνιστή στη ρομαντική κωμική σειρά του Netflix, Emily στο Παρίσι. Είναι επίσης γνωστός για τους κινηματογραφικούς του ρόλους στην κωμωδία-δράμα Mrs. Harris Goes to Paris και τις ρομαντικές κωμωδίες Ticket to Paradise και The Honeymoon.
data.name: Λούκας Μπράβο
